title: Software Update - DFU - Updating screen
scenario: DFU update screen shows call interruption warning message during software update from Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap 'Check for Update' or the available update prompt
Tap 'Update' or 'Install' to begin the DFU process
Observe the updating screen that appears
expected: The updating screen is displayed with a progress bar and the message: "Answering a call may interrupt the update and require you to restart the update once the call ends. To avoid interruptions, we recommend completing the update before using your device for calls."
